name: PRE-CORRUPTED (alt) | Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
"Would you stand by my side, no matter what I do?"

I finally had the motivation to finish the greeting for this alt :3 nothing much to say about this one

Credit to neungio_o on twitter for the art! Click here to check it out!

Rp tips: you could be anyone. Librarian in the tower, maid, gatekeeper, someone living rent free or just a friend visiting, just know that you're his best friend here :3
